Here is a concise summary of the evaluation setup and results.

---

# Evaluation Results Summary: LostInTheSecond

## 1. Evaluation Scripts (`scripts/eval/`)

| Script | Purpose | Models/Datasets |
|--------|---------|-----------------|
| **25_eval_compare_base_models.py** | Unified comparison across 8 sweeps (LoRA/FullFT × prefill/wait_recompute × 2 base models) | Qwen2.5-3B Base, Llama-3-8B Base; loads `all_results.json` from Ocean sweep dirs |
| **29_train_and_eval_comparison.py** | Train & evaluate Llama-3-8B-Base on 3 datasets × 2 methods (LoRA, Full FT) | LEMMA 1K (1000), Prefill 245, Prefill 50; outputs `prefill_vs_lemma1k_comparison.md` |
| **31_train_and_eval_full_prefill.py** | Full prefill pipeline: train & eval on 2 datasets × 2 methods | fix_step2 (498 correct), wait_recompute_all (2224); uses LEMMA math_eval.py |
| **06_eval_lora_effect.py** | Compare base vs LoRA adapter on a given task | Uses lm-evaluation-harness |
| ** merge_lora_and_eval.py** | Merge LoRA adapter into base and save model | Utility |
| **07_prefill_depth_curve.py** | Prefill depth curve (bad-prefix prefilling) | Uses MATH-500 wrong samples |
| **04_multi_card_PRM.py** | Multi-card PRM evaluation | PRM-based eval |
| **20_statistical_validation.py** | McNemar test, bootstrap CIs for LoRA/Full FT vs base | Uses per-sample predictions |
| **21_paired_prediction_analysis.py** | Paired base vs adapter predictions (fixed/broken) | Analysis |
| **22_data_quality_audit.py** | Check training data quality | Data audit |

---

## 2. Logs (`logs/`)

Representative logs and what they contain:

| Log | Content |
|-----|---------|
| **eval-38013308.out** | LoRA vs Full FT on lemma_wait_recompute: LoRA GSM8K 58.3%, MATH 20.1%; Full FT GSM8K 48.9%, MATH 17.6% |
| **1k-lora-eval-38013670.out** | LoRA on LEMMA 1K: GSM8K 69.5%, MATH 28.4% |
| **1k-ft-eval-38013663.out** | Full FT on LEMMA 1K: GSM8K 68.5%, MATH 27.9% |
| **fp_train_*.out** | Full FT training on lemma_sft_combined, lemma_sft_mixed, lemma_sft_wait_recompute_all |
| **prefill-*.out**, **prefill-full-*.out** | Prefill pipeline (LLaMA-3, GPT Step2 fix, SFT conversion) |
| **phase1/phase2-*.out** | Pipeline phases |

---

## 3. Result Documents (`documents/`)

### 3.1 Base model comparison

**base_model_comprehensive_results.md**

- **Models**: Qwen2.5-3B Base, Llama-3-8B Base, Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct (reference)
- **Datasets**: GPT-Prefill (ds2_fix), Wait+Recompute
- **Tasks**: GSM8K (1319, zero-shot CoT), MATH-500 (500)

| Model | Method | Dataset | Base GSM8K | Best GSM8K | Δ GSM8K | Best MATH |
|-------|--------|---------|------------|------------|---------|-----------|
| Qwen 2.5 3B Base | LoRA | Prefill | 73.16% | 73.39% | +0.23 | 52.20% |
| Qwen 2.5 3B Base | LoRA | W+R | 73.16% | 73.46% | +0.30 | 51.00% |
| Qwen 2.5 3B Base | Full FT | Prefill | 73.16% | 73.16% | 0.00 | 51.20% |
| Qwen 2.5 3B Base | Full FT | W+R | 73.16% | **73.54%** | **+0.38** | 51.60% |
| Llama 3 8B Base | LoRA | Prefill | 10.92% | 11.07% | +0.15 | 5.40% |
| Llama 3 8B Base | LoRA | W+R | 10.92% | 10.99% | +0.07 | 4.40% |
| Llama 3 8B Base | Full FT | Prefill | 10.92% | **11.68%** | **+0.76** | **5.60%** |
| Llama 3 8B Base | Full FT | W+R | 10.92% | 10.69% | -0.23 | 4.80% |

### 3.2 Prefill vs LEMMA 1K (Llama-3-8B-Base)

**prefill_vs_lemma1k_comparison.md**

- Baseline: GSM8K 10.84%, MATH-500 4.40%

| Method | Dataset | N | GSM8K EM | MATH-500 EM |
|--------|---------|---|----------|-------------|
| LoRA | LEMMA 1K | 1000 | 10.99% | 6.00% |
| LoRA | Prefill 245 | 245 | 12.05% | 5.20% |
| LoRA | Prefill 50 | 50 | 11.14% | 4.60% |
| Full FT | LEMMA 1K | 1000 | **14.25%** | 6.00% |
| Full FT | Prefill 245 | **17.97%** | 4.60% |
| Full FT | Prefill 50 | 16.98% | 6.00% |

### 3.3 Full prefill pipeline (Llama-3-8B-Base)

**full_prefill_llama8b_results.md**

- Baseline: 36.0% GSM8K

| Experiment | Method | Dataset | N | GSM8K Acc | Δ vs Base |
|------------|--------|---------|---|-----------|-----------|
| lora_fix498 | LoRA | fix_step2 correct | 498 | 35.9% | -0.1 |
| lora_wr2224 | LoRA | wait_recompute all | 2224 | 10.8% | -25.2 (collapse) |
| ft_fix498 | Full FT | fix_step2 correct | 498 | **53.4%** | **+17.4** |
| ft_wr2224 | Full FT | wait_recompute all | 2224 | 41.2% | +5.2 |

### 3.4 Qwen2.5-3B Base sweeps

**lora_qwen25_3b_base_results.md** (Prefill): Best `v3_lr5e6_r4_a1x` → GSM8K 73.39%, MATH 50.40%  
**lora_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md** (Wait+Recompute): Best `v3_lr1e6_r4_a1x` → GSM8K 73.46%, MATH 50.00%  
**full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_results.md** (Prefill): Best `ft2_wd01` → GSM8K 73.16%, MATH 50.00%  
**full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md** (Wait+Recompute): Best `ft2_wd005` → GSM8K 73.54%, MATH 51.40%  

---

## 4. Results JSON/CSV

- No `results*.json` or `*.csv` in the project tree; these appear under Ocean storage (e.g. `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond`).
- Eval scripts use `all_results.json` in sweep directories such as:
  - `artifacts/lora_sweep_qwen25_3b_base/_gsm8k_eval/all_results.json`
  - `artifacts/full_ft_sweep_qwen25_3b_base_wr/_gsm8k_eval/all_results.json`
  - `artifacts/comparison_llama8b/_gsm8k_eval/all_results.json`

---

## 5. `artifacts_real/`

These are data and SFT artifacts, not evaluation outputs:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **lemma_1k_original_sft.json**, **lemma_1k_original_sft_unique.json** | LEMMA 1K SFT (1000 unique) |
| **lemma_sft_fix_step2.json**, **lemma_sft_fix_step2_all.json** | Prefill SFT (50 correct, 245 all) |
| **lemma_sft_wait_recompute*.json** | Wait-recompute SFT |
| **lemma_ds2_*_gpt*.json** | GPT Step2 fix outputs |
| **lemma_llama3_generations*.json** | LLaMA-3 generations |
| **full/lemma_sft_*.json** | Full-pipeline datasets (498, 2224) |
| **full/lemma_rejection_raw.json**, **lemma_sft_rejection_sampled.json** | Rejection-sampled data |

---

## 6. Metrics and Eval Setup

- **Tasks**: GSM8K (1319 test, zero-shot CoT), MATH-500 (500 test)
- **Metrics**: Exact Match (EM), GSM8K accuracy, MATH-500 accuracy
- **Tools**: lm-evaluation-harness (vLLM backend), LEMMA `math_eval.py` (cot-meta-math, zero-shot)
- **Infrastructure**: PSC Bridges-2 (V100-32GB, H100-80GB)

---

## 7. Main Findings

1. **Qwen2.5-3B Base** starts around 73% GSM8K; gains are modest (+0.38% best with Full FT on Wait+Recompute).
2. **Llama-3-8B Base** starts much lower (~11–36% depending on setup); Full FT on curated prefill data gives up to +17.4 pp (fix498 → 53.4%).
3. **Data quality**: Curated fix_step2 (498 correct-only) beats larger wait_recompute (2224).
4. **LoRA vs Full FT**: Full FT helps more on Llama-3-8B; on Qwen2.5-3B they are close.
5. **LoRA collapse**: lora_wr2224 on noisy data drops to 10.8% (935 empty samples).
